creator: samm@FreeBSD.org
text:
Pilot-link was updated to 0.12 version, with a new API (pisock.9). 
this port depend on 0.11 API and pisock.8, so now building is failed. I did not find any updates for this packages to use 0.12 API and it seems that author does not support this program many years.
If someone use this tool - i can try to port it to 0.12 API, but i need testers. If not - the port must be marked as BROKEN.

Fix: 

Currently none.
